message:
feat(tools): implement full force_release_file_reservation with multi-signal heuristics

Add Python-parity force_release_file_reservation with 4 inactivity signals:
agent last_active_ts, mail activity (sent/read/ack), git archive commits, and
reservation expiry. Returns full reservation object with stale_reasons array,
activity timestamps, and notification status. Add get_agent_last_mail_activity
DB query for checking recent message/ack/read timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
